turns.text: Thanks for calling Sears Home Services — what appliance can I help you with today?
My HVAC is blowing warm air and I want a technician.
I can help with that — what's your zip code?
I'm sorry, I don't have any technicians covering that zip code right now for HVAC.
Not at the moment — I can flag your case and reach out the moment a slot opens nearby.
Okay, please let me know when someone's available.
Will do — thanks for your patience.

symptoms.description: blowing warm air instead of cool air
